mapper.select: SELECT jilu.id AS id, jilu.baoming_id AS baoming_id, jilu.xuehao AS xuehao, jilu.xueshengxingming AS xueshengxingming, jilu.jingsai_id AS jingsai_id, jilu.jingsaimingcheng AS jingsaimingcheng, jilu.jiaofei_jine AS jiaofei_jine, jilu.jiaofei_zhuangtai AS jiaofei_zhuangtai, jilu.jiaofei_shijian AS jiaofei_shijian, jilu.shenhe_ren AS shenhe_ren, jilu.shenhe_shijian AS shenhe_shijian, jilu.shenhe_yijian AS shenhe_yijian, jilu.zhifufangshi AS zhifufangshi, jilu.jiaoyi_hao AS jiaoyi_hao, jilu.pingzheng_tupian AS pingzheng_tupian, jilu.addtime AS addtime, feiyong.baomingfei AS baomingfei, feiyong.jiaofei_jiezhi_riqi AS jiaofei_jiezhi_riqi FROM jingsai_jiaofei_jilu jilu LEFT JOIN jingsai_feiyong feiyong ON jilu.jingsai_id = feiyong.jingsai_id 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}
